task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the structural brief text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/structural_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent starts a new IFC project in BlenderBIM/Bonsai.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender interface is open with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active, showing the creation of a new IFC4 project (ideally with the project name 'Hartwell Community Centre - Structural').

task_completion.description: Agent models at least 4 columns in a grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport in Blender shows at least 4 vertical structural elements (IfcColumn) arranged in a grid pattern.

task_completion.description: Agent models at least 4 connecting beams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows horizontal structural elements (IfcBeam) connecting the tops or spans between the columns.

task_completion.description: Agent models a ground floor slab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a flat horizontal element (IfcSlab) at the base of the columns representing the ground floor.

task_completion.description: Agent assigns a concrete material to the structural elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Material or Object Properties panel in Blender/Bonsai shows a material containing the word 'Concrete' or 'Reinforced' (e.g., 'Reinforced Concrete C30/37') assigned to the selected structural elements.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the structural model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser dialog or confirmation message showing the project being saved as '/home/ga/BIMProjects/structural_frame.ifc'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to model the elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, toolbars, and Bonsai panels, rather than just running a Python script in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely modeled the elements instead of importing a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the step-by-step addition of columns, beams, and slabs in the 3D viewport, rather than a sudden appearance of a fully completed model.
The Blender application window with Bonsai/BlenderBIM UI elements must be clearly visible, not a text editor writing raw IFC STEP code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The structural brief is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/structural_brief.txt'. The expected project name is 'Hartwell Community Centre - Structural'. The agent must model a minimum of 4 columns, 4 beams, and 1 ground floor slab. The assigned material must include the keyword 'Concrete' or 'Reinforced' (e.g., 'Reinforced Concrete C30/37'). The final output must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/structural_frame.ifc'.
